channel.title: Apm on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Apm on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Datadog Alternative: SigNoz vs Grafana Stack vs HyperDX 2026
item.description: Commercial observability platforms like Datadog, New Relic, and AppDynamics have become the default choice for monitoring modern applications. But their pricing models — often based on host count, data ingestion volume, or custom metric cardinality — can spiral into thousands of dollars per month as your infrastructure grows.
